name: nginx-multisite
description: Nginx reverse proxy and static-file server with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed certificate generation per vhost, HTTP→HTTPS redirect, HSTS, and a full suite of security hardening including UFW firewall, fail2ban jails, kernel sysctl hardening, and SSH lockdown.

name: cache
description: Dual caching layer that configures Memcached (via the memcached community cookbook) and Redis (via the redisio community cookbook) with password authentication, plus a post-install Ruby block that removes deprecated Redis config directives for compatibility with newer Redis versions.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: End-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application cloned from GitHub, running under a Python 3 virtual environment managed by uvicorn, with a PostgreSQL database backend, a .env file for runtime configuration, and a systemd unit file for service lifecycle management.
